# CodeVideo Studio

> A web-based IDE for declarative, action-based video creation. Build educational software videos in minutes, not weeks.

CodeVideo Studio is the editor and project management interface for CodeVideo. It provides a visual IDE where creators define sequences of actions that are then rendered into professional educational content. Studio supports multi-format export (video, markdown, PDF, presentations, web content) from a single source of truth.

## Key pages

- Studio (editor): https://studio.codevideo.io/
- FAQ: https://studio.codevideo.io/faq
- Contact: https://studio.codevideo.io/contact
- Embed a course or lesson: https://studio.codevideo.io/embed

## Parent site (documentation & resources)

- CodeVideo main site: https://codevideo.io/
- Actions reference: https://codevideo.io/actions
- Features: https://codevideo.io/features
- Glossary: https://codevideo.io/glossary
- Blog: https://codevideo.io/blog
- Guides: https://codevideo.io/guides
- API docs: https://api.codevideo.io/swagger

## Getting started

1. Visit https://studio.codevideo.io/
2. Create a new project or open an existing one
3. Define action steps in the editor (JSON-based or visual)
4. Preview and export to video, markdown, PDF, or presentation

## White paper

- CodeVideo Framework White Paper: https://studio.codevideo.io/pdf/CodeVideo_Framework_White_Paper.pdf
